title: leucophysalis japonica
intro: Leucophysalis japonica, also known as the Japanese nightshade or white nightshade, is a species of flowering plant in the nightshade family, Solanaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Leucophysalis japonica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Leucophysalis japonica is often prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
